headline: Assessing Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Valuation After Dividend Declaration And Upgraded Earnings Outlook
summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) is back on investors’ radar after its board declared a US$1.00 per share dividend, payable June 10, 2026, alongside recent analyst earnings revisions and a top-tier ranking. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum. The share price has climbed 12.30% over the past week and 40.92% over the past 90 days, contributing to a 50.35% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 84.15% highlights strong recent momentum around the dividend...
